tasks.dev: deno run -A npm:concurrently -r "deno task css:watch" "deno task client:watch" "deno desktop -A --unstable-no-legacy-abort --conditions browser --hmr src/main.ts"
tasks.server: deno task client:build && deno run -A --unstable-no-legacy-abort --conditions browser --watch src/main.ts
tasks.build:linux: deno task client:build && deno task css:build && deno desktop -A --unstable-no-legacy-abort --conditions browser --include static src/main.ts
tasks.build:linux:appimage: deno task client:build && deno task css:build && deno desktop -A --unstable-no-legacy-abort --conditions browser --include static --output ./dist/linux/pi-ui.AppImage src/main.ts
tasks.build:linux:deb: deno task client:build && deno task css:build && deno desktop -A --unstable-no-legacy-abort --conditions browser --include static --output ./dist/linux/pi-ui.deb src/main.ts
tasks.check: deno check --conditions browser src/main.ts rolldown.config.ts && deno check --config deno.client.json --conditions browser src/client/workspace-review.ts src/client/pierre-worker.ts
